overview: Digital Zindagi is a premium multi-vendor marketplace and professional super-app for India. It features role-based access for Super Admins, Providers, and Customers, with a real-time admin control panel, mobile recharge system, Udhaar Book, offer portal, and deep emerald green branding.
features: Multi-role authentication (Super Admin, Provider, Customer, Manager)
Provider registration with approval workflow and plan selection
Admin control panel with real-time sync for all settings
Content Locker system with secret unlock keys
Mobile recharge business system with commission engine
Udhaar Book provider ledger with WhatsApp sharing
Isolated earning offer portal with 60/40 profit split
Scrap rate calculator with WhatsApp/PDF share
PWA with emerald green branding and offline support
